Diego Rivera

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Detroit Industry Murals
by Diego Rivera
Mexican muralism · 1933
Twenty-seven fresco panels wrapping the inner court of the Detroit Institute of Arts — Rivera's homage to the Rouge auto factory, workers at the assembly line deified like Aztec labor gods.
←Rembrandt van Rijn Giovanni della Robbia→
